title: Stinson Gibner
compiled_truth: Stinson Gibner is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-05-25 to 2001-10-12), Stinson Gibner sent 129 and received 1056 emails, totalling 1185 interactions. Top correspondents: [Vince Kaminski](people/vince-kaminski) (123), [Shirley Crenshaw](people/shirley-crenshaw) (18), [Zimin Lu](people/zimin-lu) (14), [Ravi Thuraisingham](people/ravi-thuraisingham) (11), [Pinnamaneni Krishnarao](people/pinnamaneni-krishnarao) (9).
